creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maybe we are too harsh about the shar thing. Personally, I don't mind new submissions sent as a diff and would not consider it a reason to refuse a new port; especially if it apparent that the submitter knows what (s)he is doing.

@yuri: Nothing serious, but pkg comments that there are no arch dependent files in this port:
...
===>   Registering installation for anamnesis-1.0.4
pkg-static: DEVELOPER_MODE: Notice: arch "FreeBSD:10:amd64" -- no architecture specific files found:
**** could this package use a wildcard architecture?
...

Just a reminder to check whether NO_ARCH=yes makes sense for the next update.

Best regards
